# Emergency debugging guide

## Symptom: no views / no distribution

Check:

```text
eligibility
platform upload issue
account consistency
topic classification
first frame
caption/title
posting context
```

Action:

```text
Do not assume content is bad until exposure threshold is met.
Use controlled exposure or Trial Reel.
```

## Symptom: shown but swiped

Likely failure:

```text
first frame
topic scent
visual clutter
weak result/problem
```

Action:

```text
create 3 first-frame variants.
```

## Symptom: good start, poor completion

Likely failure:

```text
hook-body mismatch
slow body
late payoff
excessive text
no proof progression
```

Action:

```text
move payoff earlier, cut setup, add proof beats.
```

## Symptom: good completion, no saves/sends

Likely failure:

```text
not reusable
not socially targeted
weak CTA
no template/checklist
```

Action:

```text
turn into checklist, template, or send-to-X version.
```

## Symptom: high views, no follows

Likely failure:

```text
topic too broad
no series promise
one-off entertainment
account identity unclear
```

Action:

```text
add named series and future-value CTA.
```

## Symptom: high comments, bad trust

Likely failure:

```text
ragebait
misleading hook
weak proof
```

Action:

```text
kill or rewrite with evidence.
```
